item-01.justification: Visible link text is the generic phrase "see more", which conveys no destination out of context. Not suppressed, not in staticFindings; jsx-a11y can't judge text quality so the floor misses it.

item-02.justification: Visible text "learn more" is a canonical non-descriptive link phrase. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught (lint doesn't assess descriptiveness).

item-05.message: Link name is a raw URL
item-05.justification: The visible name is a raw URL read out character-by-character by screen readers — a polluted/noisy name. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-06.message: Link name is a file path with query string
item-06.justification: Visible name is a file path plus query string/token — noisy, non-descriptive name. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-07.justification: "read more" is a canonical generic link phrase conveying no destination. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-09.justification: "here" is a canonical non-descriptive link phrase. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-10.justification: "view more" is a canonical generic link phrase. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-11.justification: Visible text is the bare verb "click", which conveys no destination — non-descriptive. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-12.message: Link name is a breadcrumb trail
item-12.justification: Visible name is a full breadcrumb trail rather than a single descriptive destination — a polluted/noisy name. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-13.message: Link name is a breadcrumb trail
item-13.justification: Visible name is a breadcrumb trail, a noisy multi-segment name not describing one destination. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-16.justification: Visible text is the literal string "undefined" — a wrong/polluted name (template leak). Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-17.message: Link name is a raw filename
item-17.justification: Visible name is a raw versioned filename rather than a descriptive label — noisy name. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-18.message: Link name is a raw filename
item-18.justification: Visible name is a raw filename with version noise — non-descriptive polluted name. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-19.justification: "Learn more" is a canonical generic link phrase conveying no destination. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-20.message: Link name is a path with query string
item-20.justification: Visible name is a file path plus query string/token — noisy non-descriptive name. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-23.message: Link name is a raw URL
item-23.justification: Visible name is a full raw URL — polluted name read character-by-character. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-24.message: Link name is a raw URL with query string
item-24.justification: Visible name is a raw CDN URL with query params — noisy non-descriptive name. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-25.justification: "this link" conveys no destination and is meaningless out of context — non-descriptive. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-26.message: Link name is a raw path
item-26.justification: Visible name is a raw URL path rather than a descriptive label — noisy name. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-27.message: Link name is a raw SKU
item-27.justification: Visible name is a raw SKU code — a noisy, non-human-readable name. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-31.justification: "more info" is a canonical generic link phrase. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-34.justification: "click here" is the canonical generic link phrase. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-35.justification: "read more" is a canonical generic link phrase. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-36.justification: "find out more" is a canonical generic link phrase. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-38.justification: "details" is a canonical generic link phrase conveying no destination. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-40.justification: "continue" is a canonical generic link phrase. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.

item-42.justification: "click here" is the canonical generic link phrase. Unsuppressed, not floor-caught.
